# Ungrouped docs

> Root-level docs that have not been split into a dedicated namespace yet.

Use this namespace as a holding area for local docs before they deserve a more specific namespace.

## APIs

- [Example API](/api/entries/get?name=ungrouped-docs/apis/example.md): A placeholder for your own API docs

## Libraries

- [Example Lib](/api/entries/get?name=ungrouped-docs/libs/example.md): A placeholder for your own library docs

## Test

- [test/exapmle.md](/api/entries/get?name=ungrouped-docs/test/exapmle.md): Scratch test note
